params.name: Seismograph
params.description:
On Jul 31, AD 134, the seismograph detected an earthquake for the first time, including its magnitude and location.

That day, a dragon orb on the northwest side of the seismograph fell and was picked up by the mouth of a golden toad in Luoyang Palace. A few days later, people learned about the news of the Longxi earthquake! The seismograph points to 8 directions. Each direction has a dragon head and a toad below it.
